init.description: How often to poll the Polestar cloud for updates. Lower values give faster updates but may increase server load and 12v battery usage.

data.demo: Demo mode (fake vehicle, no API connection)

vehicle.title: Select your vehicle
vehicle.description: Battery, location, climate, and door/lock status are updated in real-time via streaming. The polling interval controls how often other data is fetched: odometer, tyre health, charging settings (target SOC, amp limit, charge timer), charge locations, climate timers, weather, and OTA updates.

guest_vin.title: Enter VIN manually
guest_vin.description:
No vehicles were found on this account. This is normal for secondary users and guests. Enter the VIN of the vehicle you have access to.

Battery, location, climate, and door/lock status are updated in real-time via streaming. The polling interval controls how often other data is fetched: odometer, tyre health, charging settings, charge locations, climate timers, weather, and OTA updates.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Polestar
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your password to reconnect.
